documents.contentText:
REQUEST FOR PROPOSAL – Supply and Installation of Window Coverings

The District School Board of Niagara (DSBN) invites proposals from qualified firms for the supply, installation, and maintenance of window coverings across its facilities.

Contract Term: Three (3) years with the option to renew for up to three (3) additional one-year periods.

Scope of Work:
1. Supply and install new window coverings including but not limited to: blinds, roller shades, zebra shades, motorized shading systems, solar shades, blackout shades, skylight shading systems, draperies, valances, privacy curtains, hospital cubicle curtains, and office partition curtains.
2. Provide on-site measurements as required.
3. Remove and dispose of existing window coverings, repair wall surfaces as needed.
4. All materials used to be of first quality.
5. All materials shall be tested in accordance with NFPA 701 – Vertical Burn Test and rated 'PASS'.
6. All materials and workmanship must comply with the latest version of the Ontario Fire Code.
7. Products shall meet CSA and CSGA standards.
8. Warranty: Minimum one (1) year on all products and installation.
9. System shall be operated by 3/8" thick fiberglass baton.
10. Proponents may be required to submit a sample of their product.

Evaluation Criteria (Total 70 points):
- Service response time (20 pts)
- Staff qualifications (15 pts)
- Experience and references (20 pts)
- Price (15 pts)

Submission Deadline: November 30, 2026

documents.title: Addendum-01.pdf
documents.contentText:
Addendum #1 – Clarifications

1. Q: Is local installation team required? A: Preferred but not mandatory. Subcontracting to qualified local installers is acceptable.
2. Q: Are samples required at time of bid? A: No. Samples will only be requested from shortlisted proponents.
3. Q: Insurance requirements? A: Minimum $2,000,000 general liability insurance required.
4. Flameproofing Affidavit must be provided before any payment is processed.
